brand.name: CHEW In Training
brand.description: A structured digital journey into community healthcare education, clinical experience, and public health development.

cards.title: Study Journey
cards.context: Structured learning, discipline, and academic growth in community health training.
cards.details: This section represents the academic backbone of a CHEW student. It includes structured revision routines, note organization systems, learning strategies, and disciplined study habits that shape professional competence in community health practice.

cards.title: Clinical Experience
cards.context: Real-world exposure to healthcare environments and patient care practice.
cards.details: Hands-on clinical training in hospitals, primary health centers, and outreach programs. Includes supervised patient interaction, field practice, and real-time decision learning in healthcare environments.

cards.title: Health Awareness
cards.context: Simplifying health knowledge for everyday life and community wellbeing.
cards.details: Focuses on public health education including hygiene, disease prevention, nutrition, maternal and child health, and practical community wellness education strategies.

cards.title: Community Care
cards.context: Outreach programs that strengthen health in local communities.
cards.details: Covers vaccination drives, rural health outreach, maternal support programs, hygiene awareness campaigns, and community-based healthcare interventions.

cards.title: Maternal Care Focus
cards.context: Understanding safe motherhood and child health fundamentals.
cards.details: Includes antenatal care, safe delivery practices, postnatal care, infant health monitoring, and maternal education in community healthcare settings.

cards.title: Public Health Core
cards.context: Foundational systems that support population health and disease prevention.
cards.details: Explores epidemiology basics, sanitation systems, disease prevention strategies, health policy structure, and public health implementation frameworks.

cards.title: Student Lifestyle
cards.context: Balancing education, discipline, and personal growth in training life.
cards.details: Daily routines of a CHEW student including study schedules, clinical rotations, rest cycles, stress management, and personal discipline systems.

cards.title: Future Health Professional
cards.context: Developing the mindset and skills of a future healthcare professional.
cards.details: Represents long-term transformation into a certified community health extension worker focused on service delivery, public health impact, and community wellbeing leadership.
